Conversation.title: Conversation
Conversation.description: Represents a chat session or a single message in the history.

userId.description: The UID of the user who owns this conversation.

content.description: The text content of the message.

metadata.description: Optional metadata like voice id or analysis.

UserPreferences.title: User Preferences
UserPreferences.description: Persistent memory of user settings and context.

/users/{userId}/history/{messageId}.description: Message history for a specific user.

/users/{userId}/preferences/main.description: Singleton-like document for user-specific context and memory.
